revision.comment: adding novel
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Yukio Mishima | state = {{{state|<includeonly>{{{1|collapsed}}}</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[Yukio Mishima]]
| above = * [[Yukio Mishima bibliography|Bibliography]]
| group1 = Prose books | list1 = * ''[[Confessions of a Mask]]'' (1949) * ''[[Thirst for Love]]'' (1950) * ''[[Forbidden Colors]]'' (1951, 1953) * ''[[Death in Midsummer and Other Stories]]'' (1952) * ''[[The Sound of Waves]]'' (1954) * ''[[The Temple of the Golden Pavilion]]'' (1956) * ''[[Kyoko's House]]'' (1959) * ''[[After the Banquet]]'' (1960) * ''[[The Frolic of the Beasts]]'' (1961) * ''[[Beautiful Star (novel)|Beautiful Star]]'' (1962) * ''[[The Sailor Who Fell from Grace with the Sea]]'' (1963) * ''[[The School of Flesh]]'' (1964) * ''[[Silk and Insight]]'' (1964) * ''[[Acts of Worship]]'' (1965) * ''[[Sun and Steel (essay)|Sun and Steel]]'' (1968) * ''[[Life for Sale]]'' (1968) * ''[[The Sea of Fertility]]'' ** ''[[Spring Snow]]'' (1969) ** ''[[Runaway Horses]]'' (1969) ** ''[[The Temple of Dawn]]'' (1970) ** ''[[The Decay of the Angel]]'' (1971)
| group2 = Short stories | list2 = * "[[Death in Midsummer (short story)|Death in Midsummer]]" (1952) * "[[Patriotism (short story)|Patriotism]]" (1960) * "[[Star (short story)|Star]]" (1960)
| group3 = Drama | list3 = * ''[[Five Modern Noh Plays]]'' (1950–1955) ** ''[[The Lady Aoi]]'' (1954) * ''[[Iwashi Uri Koi Hikiami]]'' (1954) * ''[[Rokumeikan (play)|Rokumeikan]]'' (1956) * ''[[Madame de Sade]]'' (1965) * ''[[My Friend Hitler]]'' (1968)
| group4 = Film | list4 = * ''[[Patriotism (1966 film)|Patriotism]]'' (1966)
| group5 = Works about | list5 = * ''[[The Moon in the Water]]'' (1979) * ''[[Mishima: A Vision of the Void]]'' (1981) * ''[[Mishima: A Life in Four Chapters]]'' (1985) * ''[[11:25 The Day He Chose His Own Fate]]'' (2012) * ''[[Persona: A Biography of Yukio Mishima]]'' (2012)
| group6 = Related topics | list6 = * [[Conservatism in Japan]] * [[Tatenokai]] * [[Mishima Yukio Prize|Yukio Mishima Prize]] * [[The Lady Aoi (Bahram Beyzai production)|''The Lady Aoi'' (Bahram Beyzai production)]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional |default=collapsed}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:Mishima, Yukio}} [[Category:Japanese writer navigational boxes]] [[Category:Dramatist and playwright navigational boxes]] [[Category:Novelist navigational boxes]] [[Category:Short story writer navigational boxes]]
</noinclude>
